inputs.label: Kaynak Birim
inputs.businessContext: Kaynak birim kodu (0: metre, 1: feet, 2: inch, 3: cm)

inputs.label: Hedef Birim
inputs.businessContext: Hedef birim kodu (0: metre, 1: feet, 2: inch, 3: cm)

formulas.convertedValue: (() => { const v = value; const from = fromUnit; const to = toUnit; const factors = [1, 0.3048, 0.0254, 0.01]; const vInMeters = v * factors[from]; const result = vInMeters / factors[to]; return Math.round(result * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision); })()
formulas.breakdown: (() => { const v = value; const from = fromUnit; const to = toUnit; const unitNames = ['metre', 'feet', 'inç', 'cm']; return [`${v} ${unitNames[from]} = ${convertedValue} ${unitNames[to]}`, `Dönüşüm faktörü: 1 ${unitNames[from]} = ${(1/factors[from]*factors[to]).toFixed(6)} ${unitNames[to]}`]; })()
